# ClawMux

> Multi-session voice interface for Claude Code. Run multiple Claude agents with independent voice conversations from a single browser tab.

Self-hosted hub on Linux with NVIDIA GPU. Uses Kokoro TTS and Whisper STT. Browser UI for real-time voice chat with multiple concurrent Claude Code sessions.

Source: https://github.com/zeulewan/clawmux

## Docs

### For Agents (AI)
- [Agent Reference — install, requirements, setup](agents/reference/agent-reference.md)
- [Hub Architecture — components, session lifecycle](agents/reference/hub.md)

- [UI Behavior — browser states, controls, audio](agents/reference/ui-behavior.md)
- [Configuration — env vars, ports, voices](agents/reference/configuration.md)
- [Orchestration — sub-agent coordination](agents/reference/orchestration.md)
- [CLI Messaging — inter-agent messaging](agents/reference/cli-messaging.md)
- [iOS App — native iOS client](agents/reference/ios.md)
- [OpenClaw Integration](agents/reference/openclaw.md)
- [Web Development Guide](agents/web-dev.md)
